Title: User Authentication Success
Preconditions: User is available and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates authentication process.
2. User provides valid credentials to FirebaseAuthentication.
3. FirebaseAuthentication stores an image in personal storage.
4. FirebaseAuthentication retrieves an image from personal storage.
5. Gemini AI service receives text input from the user via the askText component.
Expected Result: User is authenticated successfully, image stored and retrieved correctly, and text input processed by Gemini AI.

Title: User Authentication Failure with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User is available and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates authentication process.
2. User provides invalid credentials to FirebaseAuthentication.
3. FirebaseAuthentication attempts to store an image in personal storage.
4. FirebaseAuthentication attempts to retrieve an image from personal storage.
Expected Result: Authentication fails, no image is stored or retrieved, and no text input is processed by Gemini AI.

Title: Successful Login Process
Preconditions: User is available and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Main requests a token from LocalUser.
2. Main sends the token to Authentication.
3. LocalUser requests user data from Authentication.
4. Authentication creates a new LocalUser object and returns it to LocalUser.
5. Main receives confirmation ("done").
Expected Result: User logs in successfully, LocalUser object is created, and main interface confirms successful login.

Title: Failed Login Process with Null Token
Preconditions: User is available and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Main requests a token from LocalUser.
2. Main sends a null token to Authentication.
3. LocalUser requests user data from Authentication.
Expected Result: Login fails, no LocalUser object is created, and main interface does not confirm successful login.

Title: Successful Plant Photo Upload and Species Identification
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Main sends a new photo to Gemini AI API.
2. Gemini AI API identifies the plant species.
3. Gemini AI API stores the identified species in Firebase Storage.
4. Firebase Storage returns the URL of the uploaded photo to Main.
Expected Result: Plant photo is uploaded successfully, species is identified, and URL of the uploaded photo is returned.

Title: Failed Plant Photo Upload Due to AI API Error
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Main sends an invalid photo to Gemini AI API.
2. Gemini AI API fails to identify the plant species.
3. Gemini AI API does not store the species in Firebase Storage.
4. Firebase Storage does not return the URL of the uploaded photo.
Expected Result: Plant photo upload fails, species is not identified, and no URL is returned.

Title: Successful Retrieval of Photos for Each Species
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Main requests access to personal storage from Firebase Storage.
2. Firebase Storage provides the path to the personal storage.
3. Main requests photos for each species present.
4. Firebase Storage downloads the URIs of requested photos.
Expected Result: Personal storage path is provided, photos for each species are downloaded successfully, and URIs are returned.

Title: Failed Retrieval of Photos Due to Missing Species
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Main requests access to personal storage from Firebase Storage.
2. Firebase Storage provides the path to the personal storage.
3. Main requests photos for non-existent species.
4. Firebase Storage does not download any photos.
Expected Result: Personal storage path is provided, but no photos are downloaded due to non-existent species, and no URIs are returned.

Title: Successful Insertion of Plant Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. User triggers insertion/modification of plant data through DataManager.
2. DataManager processes the request.
3. Plant data is inserted/modified.
Expected Result: Plant data is successfully inserted/modified.

Title: Failed Insertion of Plant Data with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. User triggers insertion/modification of plant data through DataManager.
2. DataManager processes the request.
3. Plant data insertion/modification fails.
Expected Result: Plant data insertion/modification fails due to invalid data.
